session.user: Run these commands and report results: 1. `ruff check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py` 2. `ruff format --check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py` 3. `ty check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py`
session.assistant: I'll run these commands and report the results. These are read-only checks for linting, formatting, and type checking.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py
Run ruff linting checks on three Python files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py
Check ruff code formatting without modification

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py
Run type checking with ty on three Python files

session.assistant:
All checks passed successfully:
**1. ruff check** - PASSED: All linting checks passed for the three files - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/core/fast_llm.py - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py
**2. ruff format --check** - PASSED: All three files are properly formatted (no formatting issues)
**3. ty check** - PASSED: All type checking passed with no errors
The code is clean across all three quality checks: linting, formatting, and type safety.
